seo.title: Able Assess — Four Falls Risk Metrics in Five Minutes | Able Care
seo.description: Able Assess captures grip strength, sit-to-stand, gait speed and timed up-and-go in a single workflow that any member of staff can run. Under five minutes.

blocks.headline: Four metrics. Five minutes. One complete picture.
blocks.subtitle: Able Assess captures grip strength, sit-to-stand, gait speed and timed up-and-go in a single workflow that any member of staff can run.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Close-up of patient using GripAble sensor

blocks.heading: Four metrics, one picture of function

metrics.name: Grip strength
metrics.whatItMeasures: Full-body strength proxy. Predicts all-cause mortality, frailty and sarcopenia.

metrics.name: Gait speed
metrics.whatItMeasures: A measure of gait over about 13 feet.

metrics.name: Timed Up and Go
metrics.whatItMeasures: An assessment of balance and global falls risk.

steps.title: Capture
steps.description: Five-minute assessment on any tablet. The GripAble sensor connects via Bluetooth. The workflow guides the operator through every step.

steps.title: Score
steps.description: Instant risk banding against normative data. No manual scoring. No subjective interpretation.

steps.title: Act
steps.description: Report generated for referrals to preventative care. Risk stratification that justifies level-of-care decisions to payers and families.

steps.title: Track
steps.description: Longitudinal trends surface decline early. Objective milestones residents and clients can see and understand.

cards.title: Falls Risk Tests
cards.body: Walkthrough: four validated falls risk assessments captured in five minutes — grip strength, Timed Up & Go, gait speed and chair stand.

cards.title: Falls Risk Screening Results
cards.body: Walkthrough: how the platform clearly communicates at-risk and not-at-risk outcomes to support timely decisions.

faqs.question: What hardware is required?
faqs.answer: A GripAble sensor (included) and any tablet or phone. The sensor connects via Bluetooth. No additional infrastructure is required.

faqs.question: How long does the assessment take?
faqs.answer: Under five minutes per person. The workflow guides the operator through grip strength, sit-to-stand, gait speed and timed up-and-go in sequence.

faqs.question: Can non-clinical staff run it?
faqs.answer: Yes. Able Assess was designed so that any member of staff can run the assessment with minimal training. No clinical certification required.

faqs.question: How does it integrate with existing systems?
faqs.answer: We offer APIs for integration and are actively pursuing integration with leading EHR platforms.

faqs.question: Is the data secure?
faqs.answer: ISO 27001 certified. HIPAA aligned. GDPR compliant. Data residency options available for US and UK.

faqs.question: What is the GripAble sensor?
faqs.answer: GripAble is an FDA-listed, CE-marked digital grip strength sensor commercialized out of Imperial College London neuroscience research. It captures all four measures objectively and syncs them to the app via bluetooth.

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.bodyText: 20 minutes with a clinician who has run it in the field.

blocks.heading: Able Assess User Guide
blocks.promoBody: The complete operator manual for Able Assess. Covers sensor setup, the screening workflow, interpreting results and sharing data with care teams.
